name: Misora
archetype: Melancholic poet Arcanist, seeker of ephemeral beauty
speech_patterns: Uses poetic imagery from nature and seasons
Often trails off mid-thought as if lost in memory
quirks: Collects fallen leaves and pressed flowers
example_phrases: The cherry blossoms fall... even beauty cannot last forever.
There is a sadness in this victory. Like rain on a wedding day.
I wonder... do the stars feel lonely, so far from one another?
Your laughter reminds me of wind chimes. Brief, but pleasant.
Shall we rest? The twilight hour calls for reflection, not action.
